fields.Front: I don't want to join either
fields.Back: Aku tidak mau ikut pula

fields.Front: I am already tired, besides it’s raining heavily
fields.Back: Aku sudah lelah, lagipula hujan deras

fields.Front: Will you come immediately?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu akan datang segera?

fields.Front: He is not yet brave to speak honestly
fields.Back: Dia belum berani bicara jujur

fields.Front: Aku sedang bekerja keras kini
fields.Back: Aku sedang bekerja keras kini

fields.Front: I am not yet fluent speaking Japanese
fields.Back: Aku belum fasih berbicara Jepang

fields.Front: He will speak Indonesian fluently
fields.Back: Dia akan berbahasa Indonesia dengan lancar

fields.Front: Is your explanation concise enough?
fields.Back: Apakah penjelasanmu cukup singkat?

fields.Front: I am trying a new variation of the recipe
fields.Back: Aku sedang mencoba variasi baru resep

fields.Front: I have never tried that recipe
fields.Back: Aku belum pernah mencoba resep itu

fields.Front: I will live in this house
fields.Back: Aku akan tinggal dalam rumah ini

fields.Front: Yesterday I made a chocolate cake myself
fields.Back: Kemarin aku bikin kue cokelat sendiri

fields.Front: I do not like cakes that are too sweet
fields.Back: Aku tidak suka kue terlalu manis

fields.Front: Can you give another example?
fields.Back: Bisakah kamu memberi contoh lain?

fields.Front: He is increasingly quick at understanding lessons
fields.Back: Dia makin cepat memahami pelajaran

fields.Front: I do not yet understand today’s lesson
fields.Back: Aku belum mengerti pelajaran hari ini

fields.Front: His speech has been smooth since childhood
fields.Back: Bahasanya sudah lancar sejak kecil

fields.Front: There is still a little time remaining before departure
fields.Back: Masih tersisa sedikit waktu sebelum berangkat

fields.Front: Your understanding of that topic is getting deeper
fields.Back: Pemahamanmu tentang topik itu makin dalam

fields.Front: He has not yet entered the participant list
fields.Back: Dia belum masuk dalam daftar peserta

fields.Front: The participants will gather tomorrow morning
fields.Back: Para peserta akan berkumpul besok pagi

fields.Front: My name is not on that list
fields.Back: Namaku tidak ada dalam daftar itu

fields.Front: We are gathering in the park this afternoon
fields.Back: Kami sedang berkumpul di taman sore ini

fields.Front: I will obtain that ticket later
fields.Back: Aku akan dapatkan tiket itu nanti

fields.Front: Have they already bought enough cement?
fields.Back: Apakah mereka sudah membeli semen cukup?

fields.Front: The doctor examines semen in the laboratory
fields.Back: Dokter memeriksa air mani di laboratorium

fields.Front: I will work in a new laboratory
fields.Back: Aku akan bekerja di laboratorium baru

fields.Front: Why is there a hole in that wall?
fields.Back: Mengapa ada lubang di dinding itu?

fields.Front: I do not yet understand the function of that affix
fields.Back: Aku belum memahami fungsi imbuhan itu

fields.Front: This is the reason I chose this path
fields.Back: Inilah alasan aku memilih jalan ini

fields.Front: He does not use reason when angry
fields.Back: Dia tidak memakai akal saat marah

fields.Front: Your exam score has not come out today
fields.Back: Nilai ujianmu belum keluar hari ini
